# Regression fixture — an old in-progress spinner line (with ellipsis +
# duration) sits high in the scrollback from a prior turn. The current
# state is idle (most recent line is "Worked for …" with no ellipsis). The
# matcher must only inspect the TAIL (last ~25 lines) so the stale working
# anchor doesn't false-trigger.
#
# Expected: classify_activity -> None, detect_mode -> "default"

Earlier scrollback (should be ignored):

· Compiling… (12s · ↓ 42 tokens · thought for 1s)
· Compiling… (1m 04s · ↓ 156 tokens · thought for 3s)
· Compiling… (2m 30s · ↓ 412 tokens · thought for 7s)

  ✓ test_baz

  All 8 tests passed.

  - Refactored the auth module to use the new token flow
  - Added a retry layer around the outbound HTTP client
  - Introduced a circuit breaker for the downstream service
  - Updated the integration tests to cover the new error paths

  Let me know if you'd like me to dig into any of these.
